name: Peanut Butter Bon Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. For the cookie dough, combine brown sugar, peanut butter, shortening, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add egg. Beat just until blended.
3. Combine flour, salt, and baking soda. Add to creamed mixture on low speed. Mix just until blended.
4. Form dough into 1-inch (2.5 cm) balls. Place them 2 inches (5 cm) apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 7 to 8 minutes, or until set and just beginning to brown. Do not overbake. Cool 2 minutes on the baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely.
6. For the icing, place chocolate chips and shortening in a microwave-safe measuring cup or bowl. Microwave at 50% (MEDIUM) power for 2 to 3 minutes, or until chips are shiny and soft (or melt on rangetop in a small saucepan on very low heat). Stir until smooth. Cover each cookie with chocolate using a spatula or small butter knife. Set on wire cooling rack until chocolate has hardened.
Makes: About 4 dozen cookies
